calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances--Marina Franco specially appeared for Pltf's atty. Arnold Walter Evje. Also appearing Shanna Ngo, for S.F. Housing Authority. Defendant in pro per, Meiyuen Chuang.

Judge Pro Tem--William F. Chen, Clerk--Param Natt, Reporter--Lisa Sarto (218).

Settlement Conference held. Parties entered into a written stipulation, the terms put on the record as follows:-Plaintiff to obtain restitution of the premises located at 1424 Baker Street,#116,SF,Ca.; Lease is forfeited and there will be no stay of execution or grace period. Deft. to pay back rent in the sum of $2,450 by 5/1/05, Court costs of $175. and attorney's fees of $391 at 2501 Sutter St. SF,Ca; Balance of $391 to be paid in 33 installments begining 5/1/05 for the next 11 months; also $490 per contract paid by 5/1/05. If deft. complies with all the terms, pltf. will file a dismissal with prejudice. Each party to bear their own attorney fees and costs. Any money received will apply to the current rent first. If deft. does not comply, pltf. after 24 hr. notice to deft. based on ex-parte/declaration enter judgment against deft.; deft. cannot have any pets as stated in the contract. Both parties agree to all the terms stated above.
